prompt: Migrate the application from 'mimastery.com' to 'app.mimastery.com'. Focus on updating layout.tsx for metadata, next.config.js for image optimization, and stripeService.ts for success/cancel URLs. Ensure all hardcoded 'mimastery.com' strings are replaced with 'process.env.NEXT_PUBLIC_SITE_URL' and generate the 'scripts/check-leaks.sh' script.

assertions.text: layout.tsx contains metadataBase configured with NEXT_PUBLIC_SITE_URL
next.config.mjs contains remotePatterns for the new subdomain
scripts/check-leaks.sh is created and contains the correct grep command
No hardcoded 'mimastery.com' remains in the primary target files
